title: Fix Dark Mode White Anchored Section on Scroll
story: As a DataTools Pro user in dark mode, I want all anchored/sticky sections to use the correct dark background color when scrolling, so that there are no jarring white sections breaking the dark theme.
description: In dark mode, scrolling revealed a white anchored section that did not inherit the dark theme background. The sticky/anchored section header retained its default white background instead of adopting the dark mode color scheme.
acceptance_criteria: Anchored/sticky sections use the dark mode background color when dark mode is active
No white sections appear when scrolling in dark mode
Fix does not affect light mode styling
ux_changes: Fixed dark mode CSS for anchored/sticky sections to use the correct dark background color instead of default white.
implementation_notes: CSS dark mode override added for the sticky section background color.
comment_summary: Developer fixed the issue directly on production and shared a screenshot confirming the dark background on the anchored section.
